diive.pkgs.gapfilling.mds¶

MARGINAL DISTRIBUTION SAMPLING (MDS) Gap-filling after Reichstein et al (2005)

Reference: https://doi.org/10.1111/j.1365-2486.2005.001002.x

Classes

FluxMDS(df, flux, swin, ta, vpd[, swin_tol, ...])

Gap-filling for ecosystem fluxes using Marginal Distribution Sampling (MDS).
class diive.pkgs.gapfilling.mds.FluxMDS(df, flux, swin, ta, vpd, swin_tol=None, ta_tol=2.5, vpd_tol=0.5, avg_min_n_vals=5, verbose=1)[source]¶

Bases: object

Gap-filling for ecosystem fluxes using Marginal Distribution Sampling (MDS).

Fills missing flux data by matching similar meteorological conditions based on solar radiation (SWIN), air temperature (TA), and vapor pressure deficit (VPD). Uses the Reichstein et al. (2005) methodology with hierarchical quality levels that progressively relax meteorological constraints to fill gaps while preserving data quality.

Gap-filling process: - Matches missing observations to complete observations with similar meteorological

conditions within specified tolerance windows

  • Uses multiple quality levels with increasingly relaxed time-window and variable constraints to ensure coverage of all gaps

  • Flags gap-filled values with quality information

Reference: https://doi.org/10.1111/j.1365-2486.2005.001002.x

Examples:

See examples/gap_filling/mds.py for basic usage. See examples/gap_filling/comparison.py for side-by-side comparison with Random Forest gap-filling method.

Parameters:

  • df (DataFrame)

  • flux (str)

  • swin (str)

  • ta (str)

  • vpd (str)

  • swin_tol (list)

  • ta_tol (float)

  • vpd_tol (float)

  • avg_min_n_vals (int)

  • verbose (int)

gfsuffix = '_gfMDS'¶
__init__(df, flux, swin, ta, vpd, swin_tol=None, ta_tol=2.5, vpd_tol=0.5, avg_min_n_vals=5, verbose=1)[source]¶

Initialize optimized MDS gap-filling.

Args:

df: DataFrame containing flux, swin, ta, vpd columns flux: Name of flux variable to gap-fill swin: Name of short-wave incoming radiation variable (W m-2) ta: Name of air temperature variable (°C) vpd: Name of vapor pressure deficit variable (kPa) swin_tol: SWIN tolerance [low_rad, high_rad] (default: [20, 50]) ta_tol: TA tolerance in °C (default: 2.5) vpd_tol: VPD tolerance in kPa (default: 0.5) avg_min_n_vals: Minimum records for average (default: 5) verbose: Verbosity level (default: 1)

Parameters:

  • df (DataFrame)

  • flux (str)

  • swin (str)

  • ta (str)

  • vpd (str)

  • swin_tol (list)

  • ta_tol (float)

  • vpd_tol (float)

  • avg_min_n_vals (int)

  • verbose (int)

get_gapfilled_target()[source]¶

Gap-filled target time series

get_flag()[source]¶

Gap-filling flag, where 0=observed, 1+=gap-filled

property gapfilled_: Series¶

Gap-filled data.

property target_col: str¶

Gap-filled data.

property gapfilling_df_: DataFrame¶

Dataframe containing all data.

property scores_: dict¶

Return scores for model used in gap-filling

run()[source]¶

Execute optimized MDS gap-filling algorithm.

showplot()[source]¶

Display MDS gap-filling results with plots.

report()[source]¶

Print comprehensive MDS gap-filling report.

report_scores()[source]¶

Print model performance scores with interpretation.
